subcodes.first_line: O friends of God and His party! In this day the light of justice hath been obscured, nay, utterly effaced, by the tyranny of the oppressor of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اولیاء الله و حزبه امروز نور عدل از ظلم ظالم عالم مستور بل محو شده چه که
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for martyrs
